title: §0Revenge
lines: Creeper
Aw man
So we back in the mine
Got our pickaxe swinging from side to side
Side-side to side
This task, a grueling one
Hope to find some diamonds tonight, night, night
Diamonds tonight
Heads up
You hear a sound, turn around and look up
Total shock fills your body
I can never forget those eyes, eyes, eyes
Eyes-eyes-eyes
'Cause, baby, tonight
The creepers tryna steal our stuff again
'Cause, baby, tonight
You grab your pick, shovel, and bolt again (Bolt again-gain)
And run, run until it's done, done
Until the sun comes up in the morn'
'Cause, baby, tonight
The creeper's tryna steal our stuff again (Stuff again-gain)
Just when you think you're safe
Overhear some hissing from right behind
Right-right behind
That's a nice life you have
Shame it's gotta end at this time, time, time
Time-time-time-time
Blows up
Then your health bar drops and you could use a one-up
Get inside, don't be tardy
So, now you're stuck in there
Half a heart is left, but don't die, die, die
Die-die-die
'Cause, baby, tonight
The creeper's tryna steal our stuff again
'Cause, baby, tonight
You grab your pick, shovel, and bolt again (Bolt again-gain)
And run, run until it's done, done
Until the sun comes up in the morn'
'Cause, baby, tonight
The creeper's tryna steal our stuff again
(Creepers, you're mine, haha)
Dig up diamonds and craft those diamonds
And make some armor, get it, baby
Go and forge that like you so MLG pro
The sword's made of diamonds, so come at me, bro, huh
Training in your room under the torchlight
Hone that form to get you ready for the big fight
Every single day and the whole night
Creeper's out prowlin', hoo, alright
Look at me, look at you
Take my revenge, that's what I'm gonna do
And my blade's gonna tear through you, bring it
'Cause, baby, tonight
The creeper's tryna steal our stuff again
'Cause, baby, tonight
You grab you pirck, shovel and bolt again (Bolt again-gain, woo)
And run, run until it's done, done
Untill the sun comes up in the morn'
'Cause, baby, tonight (Come on, swing you sword up high)
The creeper's tryna steal our stuff again (Come on, jab you sword down low)
(Woo)
